task_completion.visual_evidence: The status indicator on the Purchase Order shows it is confirmed (e.g., the status pipeline highlights 'Purchase Order' instead of 'RFQ', or a 'Confirmed' status badge is clearly visible).

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the ERP web interface to complete the task.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent didn't fake the UI or expected answers.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent actually navigated through the application to create the records.
